notes: Sector relations become visible everywhere. A world's owning faction now shows its single most newsworthy relationship right on its Galaxy card — a red ⚔️ 'at war w/' pill, or a green 🤝 'allied w/' pill (peace/cold war, the common baseline, stays quiet to keep the map clean). Any faction pair currently at war or allied also gets its own line on the sidebar's Operations board, linking straight to the Politics tab. And the cycle recap's sector notes now spell out the full transition (e.g. Cold War → War) instead of just the end state. Still entirely read-only — the sector's drama is now visible wherever you're already looking.
